title: Xerific Creamy Portuguese Cornstarch Bake
description: A post-workout Portuguese dish featuring a cultured, glassy-jelly texture made with cornstarch, perfect for a muscle recovery snack.

ingredients.name: large egg replacers
ingredients.notes: flaxseed or chia eggs mix with water

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the cornstarch and sugar.
Gradually add in the almond milk, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Add in the flaxseed or chia eggs, coconut oil, vanilla extract, lemon zest, and lemon juice. Whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch (23cm) terracotta dish.
Place the dish in a large steamer basket and steam for 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the steamer and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the mixture is set.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
